name: Compound V3 Supply & Withdraw
description: Supply and withdraw on Compound V3 (cUSDCv3 / cWETHv3 / cUSDTv3 markets). Earns interest in the supplied asset with a single contract surface — simpler than V2 and more capital efficient.
use_case: Agent holds 50k USDC. Wants exposure to Compound but not Aave (diversification). Supplies on cUSDCv3 — earns 3-7% APR with no rebase complexity. Single supply() call, instant interest accrual.

verification.criteria: Tx target is one of the Comet contracts; balanceOf(agent) on Comet > 0 post-tx.
